---
title: "Research"
---

## Research Interests

- Personalized Medicine
- Reinforcement Learning
- Random Forests and Trees
- Survival Analysis
- Sufficient Dimension Reduction
- High-Dimensional Data
- Biomedical Applications: Sepsis, Food and Nutrition, Infectious Diseases, Cancer Genetics/Genomics

## Editorial Services

- AE, [ACM Transactions on Probabilistic Machine Learning](https://dl.acm.org/journal/topml) (2025 - )
- AE, [Journal of Computational and Graphical Statistics](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/ucgs20) (2024 - )
- AE, [Journal of the American Statistical Association](https://www.tandfonline.com/journals/uasa20) (2023 - )
- AE, [Statistical Analysis and Data Mining](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/19321872) (2022 - 2023)
- Editorial board reviewer, [Journal of Machine Learning Research](https://jmlr.org/) (2020-)

## Current Members

- Eugene Han (2022-)
- Mehrdad Mohammadi (2022-)
- Zhiyu Wang (2023-)
- Zexuan Zhang (2024-)
- Zhaohao Su (2025-)
- Amitakshar Biswas (2025-)

## Previous Members

**PhD**

- Yuhan Li (2025), IMC Trading
- [Tianning Xu](https://www.linkedin.com/in/tianning-xu/) (2024), Amazon
- [Wenzhuo Zhou](https://sites.google.com/view/wenzhuozhou/home/) (2022), UCI
- [Sarah E. Formentini](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sarah-formentini-43000563/) (2022), Bayer
- [Joshua D. Loyal](https://joshloyal.github.io/) (2022), FSU
- [Yutong (Jack) Li](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jack-yutong-li/) (2021), Novartis
- [William Biscarri](https://www.linkedin.com/in/williambiscarri/) (2019), J.P. Morgan

**MS**

- Chengyu Du (2024), PhD, UMass Amherst
- Haowen Zhou (2023), PhD, UVA
- Yue Mu (2018), PhD, FSU
- Jiyang Zhang (2018)
- [Peng Xu](https://francis-hsu.github.io/) (2017), PhD, UIUC
- [Ruizhong Miao](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ruizhong-miao-7227b7184/) (2017), PhD, UVA
- [Boyi Guo](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=gzkXHEIAAAAJ&hl=en) (2017), PhD, UAB

**BS**

- [Mingrui Xu](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mingrui-xu-03a94924b/) (2025), JHU
- [Ruilin Zhao](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ruilin-zhao-7a1956149/) (2018), American Express
- [Hao Wang](https://www.linkedin.com/in/hao-wang-25b7a61a1/) (2018), MS, Berkeley

## Group Photos

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-6}
![](images/group2019.jpg)

2019 group photo
:::
::: {.g-col-6}
![](images/group2022.jpg)

May 12, 2022. Photo by Xian Cao
:::
::: {.g-col-6}
![](images/group2025.jpg)

May 17, 2025. Photo by Hengrui Cai
:::
:::
